playbook.intent: End of quarter to per-account next-quarter plan, 3 upsell targets, churn-risk list with mitigation, and a refreshed reference pool.
playbook.scope: Across the active book of clients, run a structured quarterly business review that surfaces churn risk, upsell, and reference opportunities. Outputs: per-account next-quarter plan, three upsell targets, churn-risk list with mitigation, and a refreshed reference pool. Exit artifact: QBR pack per account + portfolio dashboard row updated for the quarter.

success-criteria.criterion: Account health scored for every active client
Churn-risk list with mitigation owner per account
3 upsell targets with concrete next step
Per-account next-quarter plan signed by client

stage.name: Score health
stage.intent: Cohort + outcome data to account health score per client.

tasks.task: Score each account on health rubric

stage.decision-gate: Advance once every account has a numeric health score.

stage.name: Prep QBR pack
stage.decision-gate: Advance when every active account has a draft QBR pack.

stage.name: Run reviews
stage.intent: 45-min QBR per account; capture renewal + upsell signal.
stage.decision-gate: Advance once every QBR meeting held OR formally declined.

stage.name: Plan + close out
stage.intent: Portfolio view: who renews, who churns, who upsells.
stage.decision-gate: Required output: written next-quarter plan per account + portfolio dashboard refreshed.

extra.value: [Annual planning - separate playbook, New-business pipeline review - distinct cadence]
[Active retainer + project book of 3+ clients, Basic delivery + outcome metrics already captured per account]

[Treating QBR as a status report instead of a renewal + upsell conversation, Skipping the QBR for 'happy' accounts - those are the ones to upsell, No written next-quarter plan = no contract for the next 90 days]
['Does every account have a numeric health score?', 'Did I leave each QBR with at least one client commitment?', 'Is the reference pool refreshed every quarter?']

{human: faion get-content quarter-end-retention-review --format md, agent: faion get-content quarter-end-retention-review --format context, json: faion get-content quarter-end-retention-review --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P5 micro-agency founder persona}]
